sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lam hong lak gumpa ka kiang hong nai ciang,
Bangbang hong kimvel hang lau om nawnlo;
Huihpi, Guahpite hong daisak ding a,
A khut kuak sung muanhuai hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: A khut kuak sung muanhuai hi,
A khut kuak sung muanhuai hi,
Bangbang hong kimvel hang lau om nawmlo,
A khut kuak sung muanhuai hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Itna tawh a ang sung kei hong pom ciang,
Kilemna thu Kha Siangtho’ hong hilh a;
Pasian khut in kei hong kiplet zawh ciang,
A khut kuak sung muanhuai hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ka kha kem, kei hong nusia nawnlo ding,
Hong itna khau tatsak zo om nawnlo;
Ka thei hi A mah in hong kem den ding,
A khut kuak sung muanhuai hi.
